title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. percissum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. percissum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that grows in Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. percissum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to make teas or taken as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
